title: Count on Me
why_this_song: Friendship-themed with first-conditional structures and the idiom 'count on someone'. Very clear diction — Bruno Mars enunciates every syllable.

vocab_hooks.note: phrasal verb — central to the song

grammar_callouts: first conditional: If you ever X, I'll Y

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in the chorus:
exercises.excerpt_before: You can count on me like one, two, three, I'll be

exercises.teacher_note: PT uses 'contar comigo'; note the preposition difference: EN 'on' vs PT 'com'.

exercises.prompt_en: Who can you count on in your life? Describe that person in three words.
exercises.prompt_pt: Com quem você pode contar na sua vida? Descreva essa pessoa em três palavras.

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** The counting (one, two, three) reinforces basic numbers for A1.1. The first-conditional refrain gives four clean reps in 3 minutes.
